description: Without axis labels, a reader cannot determine what the x-axis numbers (15–40) or y-axis numbers (0–100) represent simply by looking at the chart. While the title hints at the relationship, it is unclear whether the x-axis shows age in years, some index, or another variable, and the y-axis values are equally ambiguous without their descriptive label. This forces the viewer to guess the meaning of the data dimensions rather than reading them directly from the chart.
